From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Gemeindeverwaltungsverband](/w/index.php?title=Gemeindeverwaltungsverband&redirect=no "Gemeindeverwaltungsverband"))

Union of at least two municipalities in Germany to exercise the powers of self-government

[![The vertical (federal) separation of powers across the federal government (white), the states (yellow), and the municipalities (brown).](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/3b/Administrative_divisions_of_Germany.svg/500px-Administrative_divisions_of_Germany.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Administrative_divisions_of_Germany.svg "File:Administrative divisions of Germany.svg")

Administrative divisions of Germany (clickable [image](/wiki/File:Administrative_divisions_of_Germany.svg "File:Administrative divisions of Germany.svg"))

***Gemeindeverband*** (German: [[ɡəˈmaɪ̯ndəfɛɐ̯ˌbant]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German") [ⓘ](/wiki/File:De-Gemeindeverband.ogg "File:De-Gemeindeverband.ogg")) is a union of at least two municipalities ([German](/wiki/German_language "German language"): *[Gemeinde](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Germany "Municipalities of Germany")*) in [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany") to form a *Körperschaft des öffentlichen Rechts* ([statutory corporation](/wiki/Statutory_corporation "Statutory corporation")) with the purpose to exercise the powers of self-government at a larger scale, while maintaining autonomy of its members.

The word is mentioned multiple times in the [German constitution](/wiki/Basic_Law_for_the_Federal_Republic_of_Germany "Basic Law for the Federal Republic of Germany") ([German](/wiki/German_language "German language"): *Grundgesetz*),[[1]](#cite_note-Art28-1)[[2]](#cite_note-Art84-2)[[3]](#cite_note-Art85-3)[[4]](#cite_note-Art91e-4)[[5]](#cite_note-Art93-5)[[6]](#cite_note-Art104b-6)[[7]](#cite_note-Art105-7)[[8]](#cite_note-Art106-8)[[9]](#cite_note-Art107-9)[[10]](#cite_note-Art108-10)[[11]](#cite_note-Art115c-11)[[12]](#cite_note-Art120-12)[[13]](#cite_note-Art134-13)[[14]](#cite_note-Art135a-14) but without an exact definition.

The [States of Germany](/wiki/States_of_Germany "States of Germany") have slightly different kinds of a *Gemeindeverband*:

*Gemeindeverbände unterhalb der Kreisebene* (collective municipalities) to allow direct co-operation of municipalities:

* [Gemeindeverwaltungsverband](/wiki/Gemeindeverwaltungsverband "Gemeindeverwaltungsverband") in Baden-Württemberg
* [Verwaltungsgemeinschaft](/wiki/Verwaltungsgemeinschaft "Verwaltungsgemeinschaft") in Bavaria
* [Amt](/wiki/Amt_(country_subdivision) "Amt (country subdivision)") in Brandenburg
* [Amt](/wiki/Amt_(country_subdivision) "Amt (country subdivision)") in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern
* [Samtgemeinde](/wiki/Samtgemeinde "Samtgemeinde") in Lower Saxony
* [Verbandsgemeinde](/wiki/Verbandsgemeinde "Verbandsgemeinde") in Rhineland-Palatinate
* [Verwaltungsgemeinschaft](/wiki/Verwaltungsgemeinschaft "Verwaltungsgemeinschaft") in Saxony
* [Verwaltungsverband](/wiki/Verwaltungsverband "Verwaltungsverband") in Saxony
* [Verbandsgemeinde](/wiki/Verbandsgemeinde "Verbandsgemeinde") in Saxony-Anhalt
* [Verwaltungsgemeinschaft](/wiki/Verwaltungsgemeinschaft "Verwaltungsgemeinschaft") in Saxony-Anhalt
* [Amt](/wiki/Amt_(country_subdivision) "Amt (country subdivision)") in Schleswig-Holstein
* [Verwaltungsgemeinschaft](/wiki/Municipal_associations_in_Thuringia "Municipal associations in Thuringia") in Thuringia

*Gemeindeverbände oberhalb der Kreisebene* to allow direct co-operation of districts (*[Landkreis](/wiki/Landkreis "Landkreis")*), commonly summarised as higher municipal association ([German](/wiki/German_language "German language"): *[Höherer Kommunalverband](/w/index.php?title=H%C3%B6herer_Kommunalverband&action=edit&redlink=1 "Höherer Kommunalverband (page does not exist)")*:

* [Bezirk](/w/index.php?title=Bezirk_(Bavaria)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Bezirk (Bavaria) (page does not exist)") in Bavaria
* [Bezirksverband Pfalz](/w/index.php?title=Bezirksverband_Pfalz&action=edit&redlink=1 "Bezirksverband Pfalz (page does not exist)") in Rhineland-Palatinate
* [Landschaftsverband](/wiki/Landschaftsverband "Landschaftsverband") in North Rhine-Westphalia
* [Landschaftsverband](/wiki/Landschaftsverband "Landschaftsverband") in Lower Saxony
